identity.name: Fixify
identity.tagline: See it. Say it. Report it.

typography.instructions: Use Manrope for all headings to give a modern, friendly civic feel. Use Satoshi or Inter for body text for maximum readability. Avoid generic 'Arial' look.

primary.description: Electric Indigo - Represents trust and digital efficiency

secondary.description: Civic Cyan - Used for 'Fixed' status and positive actions

accent.description: Deep Violet - Used for AI features (Fixi Bot)

destructive.description: Urgent Red - For critical issues or 'Report' actions

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-11 px-8 rounded-full font-medium transition-transform active:scale-95 shadow-lg shadow-primary/25
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 h-11 px-8 rounded-full font-medium transition-colors

cards.feature: bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:border-indigo-100 transition-all group relative overflow-hidden
cards.report: bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 hover:shadow-md transition-all
cards.stat: bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 rounded-2xl p-6 border border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-700

inputs.default: h-12 rounded-lg border-slate-200 focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-indigo-500/20 bg-white dark:bg-slate-900

badges.status_open: bg-orange-100 text-orange-700 border-orange-200 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold
badges.status_fixed: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold
badges.category: bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 border-slate-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-md text-xs font-medium

bento_hero.main: col-span-1 md:col-span-8 row-span-2 bg-indigo-600 rounded-3xl p-8 text-white relative overflow-hidden
bento_hero.side_top: col-span-1 md:col-span-4 bg-slate-900 text-white rounded-3xl p-8
bento_hero.side_bottom: col-span-1 md:col-span-4 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-3xl p-8

hero_bg.usage: Hero section background or main visual

report_road.usage: Example of a road issue report

report_waste.usage: Example of a waste issue report

fixi_avatar.usage: Chatbot widget icon and AI features

assets.icons: Use Lucide React (already installed). Preferred icons: MapPin, Camera, AlertTriangle, CheckCircle2, Users, Bot, BarChart3.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'Bootstrap' layouts. Use the Bento Grid system defined above.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast. Use slate-600 for secondary text, not gray-400.
Interactive elements must have a hover state that changes color or lifts.
Use 'data-testid' on all buttons and inputs.
For the Map, use 'react-leaflet' with a custom tile layer (e.g., CartoDB Voyager) to match the clean UI.
The 'Fixi' chatbot should be a floating widget, not a full page.
Forms should be split into steps if they have more than 5 fields.
